items.title: Bring color-changing ambiance to outdoor spaces with this Govee 2-pack of Matter Garden Lights at a $100 low (Reg. $170)
items.summary:
By way of its official Amazon storefront, Govee is offering its Matter Outdoor Garden Lights 2-Pack down at $99.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing directly from the brand’s website. While this model carries a $170 MSRP from Govee’s website, since the day following Christmas Amazon had it priced higher at $200, which dropped back down to its regular going rate in late February, and is now dropping further here. The 41% markdown cuts $70 off the tag to land it back at the all-time lowest price we have tracked for the first time since it last appeared for Christmas sales. You can also browse the brand’s other ongoing smart lighting deals in the official Amazon storefront here, or via the main website’s sale page here.

more…

items.summary:
If you want to add one of EGO’s most advanced string trimmers to your arsenal, over at Amazon you can pick up the brand’s 56V 16-inch Telescopic Carbon Fiber POWERLOAD LINE IQ String Trimmer with a 4.0Ah battery down at $289 shipped. This package would normally run you $359 at full price, but luckily we’ve seen it down at this rate since late February, with it keeping strong at $290 before that starting in mid-February. While we have seen it dip a bit lower in the past, you’re still looking at a solid $70 markdown here that gives you the best price we have tracked since Cyber Monday deals ended.

items.summary:
As part of its Spring sale event, Anker’s official Amazon storefront is offering its 70W 3-port Nano charger for $34.99 shipped. Regularly priced at $50, today’s deal knocks $15 off for a solid 30% discount. It’s available in black, blue, pink, and white, and all colorways are down to $35 right now. While the black model briefly dipped to $33 during Black Friday, today’s offer marks the lowest price we’ve tracked for the other finishes. You also get a 5-foot USB-C cable in the box with these chargers, so you’re looking at a solid overall value at its discounted price. Head below for more details.

The price here is only beaten out by falls to $208 that last happened in September, as well as the one-time drop to the $197 low that we spotted during early October’s Prime Day event. items.title: EcoFlow’s 4,096Wh DELTA Pro 3 power station with 26 recharging options down at $2,099 (today only), more from $999
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Spring Power Station Sale, EcoFlow is also giving us a 24-hour flash sale lineup of four units with up to 62% savings that will last until 3 a.m. PST. One of my personal favorites is joining this short-term event, as you can score EcoFlow’s DELTA Pro 3 Portable Power Station at $2,099 shipped, beating out its Amazon pricing by $200. While the brand may have a $3,699 MSRP slapped onto this powerful backup companion, it’s mostly been keeping between $1,999 and $2,299 in 2026, with a very short-lived spike up to $3,066 we saw at the top of the month. The price did drop to $1,899 for the first and only time in its history mid-January, but that rate has not been seen again, even in the flash sales since. Still, today’s deal gives you a solid $200 markdown from the recent going rate, $967 savings over the price spike from last week (and $1,600 off the MSRP), landing it at the third-lowest price we have tracked. Head below to learn more about why this is one of my favorite EcoFlow models and also browse the full lineup of flash deals while they last.

more…

items.title: Pokémon Pokopia down at $63 via Sam’s Club, ongoing Mario Day game deals, more
items.summary:
Mario Day 2026 is officially over now, but that does not mean the game deals are. In fact most of them will running right through until March 18, but you will want to get in there sooner than later when it comes to the physical titles as certain games will and already are starting to sell out at select retailers (you’ll find them all below). 

We also wanted to quickly shout out the Pokémon Pokopia courtesy of Sam’s Club – members can now score the extremely well-received Pokémon life sim experience down at $62.98 from the regular $70 list price. Still up at MSRP everywhere else, it appears as though you will need to be a member but this is the lowest price around so we wanted to make sure it was on the radar.
